primary user|intended user|first user|sp: A developer using it in scripts or CI
expected.decision or task|user-facing purpose|rep: Help a developer produce a deterministic category summary for automated checks.
expected.evidence of need|already done|observable: Developers maintain ad hoc scripts that repeatedly fail on malformed input or unstable output.
expected.smallest useful|smallest version: Support one fixed CSV schema and a deterministic category summary.
information must the text report show|in: Show category totals followed by Total and Rows.
expected.do today to summarize|do today to produc: They use ad hoc scripts whose inconsistent validation and output break automation.
expected.malformed rows|invalid rows|invalid inpu: Fail the whole command with exit code 2 and do not leave a report.
expected.I/O failures|unreadable input|unwritable: Exit 1 and leave no partial report.
expected.empty input|empty file|header-only: Treat an empty file like zero rows and emit Total: 0.00 and Rows: 0.
expected.category casing|case-insensitive: Preserve the first trimmed spelling while grouping case-insensitively.
expected.output order|deterministic order|sort ca: Sort categories case-insensitively, then emit Total and Rows.
expected.execution slices|delivery slices|work sl: First parse and validate; then aggregate and render.
